validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.betweenLength: Length must be between $min$ and $max$ characters.
validation.invalidUsername: Only letters, numbers and _ - . are allowed

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Please log in to your account

signUp.title: Create an Account
signUp.subtitle: Sign up to start using Shinga
signUp.successMessage: Account successfully created. You can now log in.

emailStep.title: Password Reset
emailStep.subtitle: Enter the email address associated with your account and we'll send you a recovery code.
emailStep.successMessage: If an account with that email exists, you'll receive a recovery email with a code.

verificationStep.title: Verification Code
verificationStep.subtitle: Enter the code we sent to your email address.

newPasswordStep.title: New Password
newPasswordStep.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
newPasswordStep.successMessage: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now log in with your new password.

emptyState.title: No Favorites Yet
emptyState.description: Start adding your favorite titles to see them here.

rating.dialogTitle: Did you like the title? Rate it!

editUrlDialog.title: Edit Title URL
editUrlDialog.description: Enter the URL you want to use for reading this title.

replaceUrlDialog.title: Want to change the URL?
replaceUrlDialog.description: You have stopped on this link. Do you want to update it?

saveProgressDialog.title: Save Reading Progress?
saveProgressDialog.description: Do you want to save this new URL to resume reading from here next time?

bookmarks.title: Bookmarks
bookmarks.emptyDescription: Add titles to bookmarks and your reading stats will appear here.

ratings.title: Ratings
ratings.emptyDescription: Rate titles to build your rating distribution.

logout.dialogContent: Are you sure you want to log out?

clearCache.title: Clear Cache
clearCache.description: This action will delete all downloaded ad blocker rules. Are you sure you want to continue?

fetchError.title: Failed to Load Titles
fetchError.description: An error occurred while fetching titles. Please try again.

connectionTimeout.title: Connection Timed Out
connectionTimeout.description: The server took too long to respond. Check your connection and try again.

noInternet.title: No Internet Connection
noInternet.description: You appear to be offline. Please check your network settings.

unknownNetworkError.title: Network Error
unknownNetworkError.description: An unexpected network error occurred. Please try again.

serverError.title: Server Error
serverError.description: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.

unauthorized.title: Session Expired
unauthorized.description: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

forbidden.title: Access Denied
forbidden.description: You don't have permission to perform this action.

notFound.title: Not Found
notFound.description: The requested resource could not be found.

rateLimit.title: Too Many Requests
rateLimit.description: You've made too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

invalidCredentials.title: Invalid Credentials
invalidCredentials.description: The username or password you entered is incorrect.

missingCredentials.title: Credentials Required
missingCredentials.description: Please provide your login credentials to continue.

invalidTokenCredentials.title: Session Invalid
invalidTokenCredentials.description: Your authentication token is invalid or has expired. Please log in again.

verificationCodeNotFound.title: Code Not Found
verificationCodeNotFound.description: The verification code does not exist or has already expired.

invalidVerificationCode.title: Invalid Code
invalidVerificationCode.description: The verification code you entered is incorrect. Please try again.

titleNotFound.title: Title Not Found
titleNotFound.description: The requested title could not be found.

userNotFound.title: User Not Found
userNotFound.description: No account was found with the provided details.

userTitleNotFound.title: User Title Not Found
userTitleNotFound.description: Please add the title to your bookmarks first.

userAlreadyExists.title: Account Already Exists
userAlreadyExists.description: An account with these details already exists.

userTitleAlreadyExists.title: Title Already Assigned
userTitleAlreadyExists.description: You already have this title. No changes were made.

validationError.title: Invalid Input
validationError.description: Some fields contain invalid values. Please check your input and try again.

storageReadError.title: Storage Read Error
storageReadError.description: An error occurred while reading from storage.

storageWriteError.title: Storage Write Error
storageWriteError.description: An error occurred while saving to storage.

storageDeleteError.title: Storage Delete Error
storageDeleteError.description: An error occurred while deleting from storage.

filterFetchFailure.title: Filter Fetch Error
filterFetchFailure.description: An error occurred while fetching the ad blocker filters.

cacheRestoreFailure.title: Cache Restore Error
cacheRestoreFailure.description: An error occurred while restoring the ad blocker cache.

engineBuildFailure.title: Engine Build Error
engineBuildFailure.description: An error occurred while building the ad blocker engine.

engineInitFailure.title: Engine Init Error
engineInitFailure.description: An error occurred while initializing the ad blocker engine.

webViewIsolateCrashFailure.title: WebView Isolate Crash Error
webViewIsolateCrashFailure.description: An error occurred in the WebView isolate process.

unknown.title: Something Went Wrong
unknown.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
